title: Closing Gong Ceremony to introduce the new MD/CEO of Guinness Nigeria, Mr John Musunga
description: During a Closing Gong Ceremony to introduce the new MD/CEO of Guinness Nigeria, Mr John Musunga to the Capital Market Community on Thursday, June 15, 2023 in Lagos.
html: During a Closing Gong Ceremony to introduce the new MD/CEO of Guinness Nigeria, Mr John Musunga to the Capital Market Community on Thursday, June 15, 2023 in Lagos.
